 - R&D: T1 completed (+0.029), T2 completed (+0.062), total +0.091

-## CRITICAL PROBLEM (Week 14)
-- **94 leads arrived, ONLY 1 converted!** 90 S1 lost, 11 S2 lost, 10 S3 lost
-- Root cause: Quality at listed prices was insufficient. At $17/Plan A T2, quality=0.2757 doesn't meet S1 expectations at that price
-- S2 Plan A at T2 (0.3247) is well below S2 quality floor (0.521)
-- S3 Plan A at T2 (0.2873) close to S3 floor at our listed prices
+## CRITICAL INSIGHT (Week 15)
+**0% lead conversion for 2 weeks running! Even at $9 Plan A!**
+- 84 leads, 0 new subscribers (week 14: 94 leads, 1 new sub)
+- 62 S1 Plan A at $9 were ALL lost (status='lost')
+- This proves actual S1 quality threshold at $9 > 0.2764
+- The info level 1 quality floor estimate (0.081 ±65%) is WILDLY inaccurate
+- Cumulative competitor events (~+0.24) have pushed real floors way above estimated floors
 
-## ACTIONS TAKEN WEEK 14
-1. **Plan A price: $17 → $9** (massive cut — lower price = lower quality expectations)
-2. **Plan B price: $39 → $35, Plan C: $99 → $89**
-3. **Lead promo: $2 → $5 global** (new S1 leads see Plan A at $4 first month)
-4. **Quotas: A=2000 (was 1000), B=8000 (was 5000)** — addresses social complaints about caps
-5. Removed S1 targeted ops ($25/day saved)
-6. Kept S2 targeted dev ($30/day)
+## ACTIONS TAKEN WEEK 15

+## Why We're Losing All Leads
+1. **Quality expectations have risen dramatically** due to competitor events
+2. Info level 1 estimates (±65% noise) are USELESS for decision-making
+3. Actual S1 floor at $9 appears to be >0.2764 (maybe 0.30+)
+4. At T3 Plan A quality 0.331, MIGHT be enough. If not, need T4 (0.3685)
+5. S2 floor (0.521) still impossibly high - no plan reaches it
 
-**S2 IS UNSERVABLE**: None of our plans deliver quality above 0.521. S2 subs are grandfathered in and tolerate it for now but all S2 leads will be lost. S2B subs (14) paying ~$38 are retention risks.
+## Financial Estimate
+- Weekly revenue: ~$1,700
+- Weekly costs: ~$4,253 (compute ~$2,454 + capacity $595 + ops $525 + dev $770 + ads $70 + lead_acq $14)

-## Strategic Priorities (Weeks 15-20)
-1. **DRIVE S1 VOLUME**: At $9, S1 conversion should improve dramatically. Monitor.
-2. **WATCH COMPUTE**: Higher quotas (A=2000) may increase compute costs. If compute >$1500/wk, consider reducing quotas.
-3. **S2 IS A DEAD SEGMENT for new leads** — quality floor 0.521 > our best quality 0.4762. Only keep S2B subs as long as they tolerate it.
-4. **SAVE CASH**: Need $167K+ for next R&D tier. At current burn, will take ~32 weeks. Consider cutting S2 targeted dev once bonus is sufficient.
-5. **IMPLEMENTATION OPPORTUNITY**: No enterprise leads coming in (PMI contraction). Focus on individual volume.
+## Strategic Priorities (Weeks 16-20)
+1. **MONITOR CONVERSION**: If Plan A at T3 starts converting S1, great! If not, upgrade to T4.
+2. **FIX ISSUES**: 88 open issues → need ops to resolve before they cause more churn
+3. **REVENUE PRESERVATION**: Keep existing B and C subs happy (they pay the most)
+4. **QUALITY IS EVERYTHING**: In-app ads at 0.1 strength → minimal revenue but also minimal quality impact
+5. **CASH CONSERVATION**: ~10 weeks runway. Every dollar counts.
 
 ## Key Lessons Learned
-1. ✅ Plan A at tier 2 saves MASSIVE compute. S1 floor is so low (0.081) it's safe.
-2. ✅ Compute is the #1 cost. Always check model tier costs first.
-3. ❌ NEVER spend $60K on research when cash is only $106K
-4. ⚠️ Competitor events push quality floors up PERMANENTLY — cumulative ~+0.24 so far
-5. ✅ Targeted dev spending persists after stopping — use strategically
-6. ⚠️ set_targeted_ad_spend REPLACES all ad spend (not additive)
-7. ⚠️ log_rationale() does NOT accept context kwarg
-8. ✅ Social media + referral best for S1; LinkedIn produces ZERO enterprise leads
-9. ⚠️ PMI contraction (46.1) means enterprise buyers delaying purchases
-10. ⚠️ S2 quality floor (0.521) CANNOT be met by any plan — S2 is a lost cause for new leads
-11. ✅ **PRICE IS KEY FOR CONVERSION**: Listed price determines quality expectations. Lower price = lower quality threshold = more conversions.
+1. ✅ **Quality determines conversion, NOT price** - lowering price to $9 didn't help if quality is still too low
+2. ⚠️ Info level 1 estimates (±65% noise) are USELESS - quality floor estimates can be off by 3-4x

+4. ✅ Model tier upgrades give immediate quality boost - T2→T3 gives +20% quality
